TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pnba maki yow na gaga na ms'unan te utux, gaga na iyik musa magal knerin innagan btiyux gluw na ina ro prasun naha sali ina, mrkyas ro yaba yaya nya, mtswe, ro gluw nya, ro lpyung ga mso'un musa magal ina, gluw knerin ga mnaga mwah gluw mlikuy ro lmon samow urow kya kwara y'aya rasun, wa tegan gluw mlikuy kwara y'aya ro s'agal nya, binah ga mrkyas sbi' nya y'aya yutas yaki, utux utux thawak ga sbi' nya msswe na ina, mkita sa'ing mrkyas laga, ina ga lmon tinun lukus ro splukus nya likuy nya lukus, toyah, snyuw tunux, yubing tutoh, skayal nya likuy nya malax lukus nya micu ro, splukus nya kwara lukus tnunan nya, tmsu'an gaga magal knerin laga, p'abi kya utux gbyan, ptna' gbyan kya ga mlahuy sm'as. te saying, gaga na psbinah sali innagan knerin mybuw cugan sasan, mlikuy hiya ga p'aras sragi na knerin htuw tanux, beta cka tu'iy musa sali ga musa mung owas na sili', myasa yow na mita sili' ga psbinah panga knerin mlikuy ro lmon musa, yaba yaya, msswe, gluw na ina hiya ga satu naha la'iy naha knerin, ro tputing mwah uy, kwara knerin gluw na mlikuy ga miyuk sali, mnaga ro mtama 'pa na mlikuy nya, ina ga sbi' pala yaba yaya, msswe na mlikuy, gluw na mlikuy hiya ga mwah msli sali uy, s'agan naha sinuw ro uwow knaley naha, gmluw gluw na ina mso'un mani' ro mnbuw uwow, mso'un mowas ro miyiy, beta masu' pn'as.
S.PHON: pnő≤a maki jow na …£a…£a na ms~…ē Ēunan te utux, …£a…£a na ijik mus~…ēa ma…£al knerin inna…£an ő≤tijux …£luw na ina ro pras~…ēun nańßa s~…ēali ina, mrkjas~…ē ro jaő≤a jaja nja, mts~…ēwe, ro …£luw nja, ro lpjuŇč …£a ms~…ēo Ēun mus~…ēa ma…£al ina, …£luw knerin …£a mna…£a mwańß …£luw mlikuj ro lmon s~…ēamow urow kja kwara j Ēaja ras~…ēun, wa te…£an …£luw mlikuj kwara j Ēaja ro s~…ē Ēa…£al nja, ő≤inańß …£a mrkjas~…ē s~…ēő≤i Ē nja j Ēaja jutas~…ē jaki, utux utux tńßawak …£a s~…ēő≤i Ē nja ms~…ēs~…ēwe na ina, mkita s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē la…£a, ina …£a lmon tinun lukus~…ē ro s~…ēplukus~…ē nja likuj nja lukus~…ē, tojańß, s~…ēnjuw tunux, juő≤iŇč tutońß, s~…ēkajal nja likuj nja malax lukus~…ē nja mi ¶~ ®u ro, s~…ēplukus~…ē nja kwara lukus~…ē tnunan nja, tms~…ēu Ēan …£a…£a ma…£al knerin la…£a, p Ēaő≤i kja utux …£ő≤jan, ptna Ē …£ő≤jan kja …£a mlańßuj s~…ēm Ēas~…ē. te s~…ēajiŇč, …£a…£a na ps~…ēő≤inańß s~…ēali inna…£an knerin mjő≤uw ¶~ ®u…£an s~…ēas~…ēan, mlikuj ńßija …£a p Ēaras~…ē s~…ēra…£i na knerin ńßtuw tanux, ő≤eta ¶~ ®ka tu Ēij mus~…ēa s~…ēali …£a mus~…ēa muŇč owas~…ē na s~…ēili Ē, mjas~…ēa jow na mita s~…ēili Ē …£a ps~…ēő≤inańß paŇča knerin mlikuj ro lmon mus~…ēa, jaő≤a jaja, ms~…ēs~…ēwe, …£luw na ina ńßija …£a s~…ēatu nańßa la Ēij nańßa knerin, ro tputiŇč mwańß uj, kwara knerin …£luw na mlikuj …£a mijuk s~…ēali, mna…£a ro mtama Ēpa na mlikuj nja, ina …£a s~…ēő≤i Ē pala jaő≤a jaja, ms~…ēs~…ēwe na mlikuj, …£luw na mlikuj ńßija …£a mwańß ms~…ēli s~…ēali uj, s~…ē Ēa…£an nańßa s~…ēinuw ro uwow knalej nańßa, …£mluw …£luw na ina ms~…ēo Ēun mani Ē ro mnő≤uw uwow, ms~…ēo Ēun mowas~…ē ro mijij, ő≤eta mas~…ēu Ē pn Ēas~…ē.
S.FORM: pnba maki yow na gaga na ms'unan te utux, gaga na iyik musa magal knerin innagan btiyux gluw na ina ro prasun naha sali ina, mrkyas ro yaba yaya nya, mtswe, ro gluw nya, ro lpyung ga mso'un musa magal ina, gluw knerin ga mnaga mwah gluw mlikuy ro lmon samow urow kya kwara y'aya rasun, wa tegan gluw mlikuy kwara y'aya ro s'agal nya, binah ga mrkyas sbi' nya y'aya yutas yaki, utux utux thawak ga sbi' nya msswe na ina, mkita sa'ing mrkyas laga, ina ga lmon tinun lukus ro splukus nya likuy nya lukus, toyah, snyuw tunux, yubing tutoh, skayal nya likuy nya malax lukus nya micu ro, splukus nya kwara lukus tnunan nya, tmsu'an gaga magal knerin laga, p'abi kya utux gbyan, ptna' gbyan kya ga mlahuy sm'as. te saying, gaga na psbinah sali innagan knerin mybuw cugan sasan, mlikuy hiya ga p'aras sragi na knerin htuw tanux, beta cka tu'iy musa sali ga musa mung owas na sili', myasa yow na mita sili' ga psbinah panga knerin mlikuy ro lmon musa, yaba yaya, msswe, gluw na ina hiya ga satu naha la'iy naha knerin, ro tputing mwah uy, kwara knerin gluw na mlikuy ga miyuk sali, mnaga ro mtama 'pa na mlikuy nya, ina ga sbi' pala yaba yaya, msswe na mlikuy, gluw na mlikuy hiya ga mwah msli sali uy, s'agan naha sinuw ro uwow knaley naha, gmluw gluw na ina mso'un mani' ro mnbuw uwow, mso'un mowas ro miyiy, beta masu' pn'as.
S.PHON: pnő≤a maki jow na …£a…£a na ms~…ē Ēunan te utux, …£a…£a na ijik mus~…ēa ma…£al knerin inna…£an ő≤tijux …£luw na ina ro pras~…ēun nańßa s~…ēali ina, mrkjas~…ē ro jaő≤a jaja nja, mts~…ēwe, ro …£luw nja, ro lpjuŇč …£a ms~…ēo Ēun mus~…ēa ma…£al ina, …£luw knerin …£a mna…£a mwańß …£luw mlikuj ro lmon s~…ēamow urow kja kwara j Ēaja ras~…ēun, wa te…£an …£luw mlikuj kwara j Ēaja ro s~…ē Ēa…£al nja, ő≤inańß …£a mrkjas~…ē s~…ēő≤i Ē nja j Ēaja jutas~…ē jaki, utux utux tńßawak …£a s~…ēő≤i Ē nja ms~…ēs~…ēwe na ina, mkita s~…ēa ĒiŇč mrkjas~…ē la…£a, ina …£a lmon tinun lukus~…ē ro s~…ēplukus~…ē nja likuj nja lukus~…ē, tojańß, s~…ēnjuw tunux, juő≤iŇč tutońß, s~…ēkajal nja likuj nja malax lukus~…ē nja mi ¶~ ®u ro, s~…ēplukus~…ē nja kwara lukus~…ē tnunan nja, tms~…ēu Ēan …£a…£a ma…£al knerin la…£a, p Ēaő≤i kja utux …£ő≤jan, ptna Ē …£ő≤jan kja …£a mlańßuj s~…ēm Ēas~…ē. te s~…ēajiŇč, …£a…£a na ps~…ēő≤inańß s~…ēali inna…£an knerin mjő≤uw ¶~ ®u…£an s~…ēas~…ēan, mlikuj ńßija …£a p Ēaras~…ē s~…ēra…£i na knerin ńßtuw tanux, ő≤eta ¶~ ®ka tu Ēij mus~…ēa s~…ēali …£a mus~…ēa muŇč owas~…ē na s~…ēili Ē, mjas~…ēa jow na mita s~…ēili Ē …£a ps~…ēő≤inańß paŇča knerin mlikuj ro lmon mus~…ēa, jaő≤a jaja, ms~…ēs~…ēwe, …£luw na ina ńßija …£a s~…ēatu nańßa la Ēij nańßa knerin, ro tputiŇč mwańß uj, kwara knerin …£luw na mlikuj …£a mijuk s~…ēali, mna…£a ro mtama Ēpa na mlikuj nja, ina …£a s~…ēő≤i Ē pala jaő≤a jaja, ms~…ēs~…ēwe na mlikuj, …£luw na mlikuj ńßija …£a mwańß ms~…ēli s~…ēali uj, s~…ē Ēa…£an nańßa s~…ēinuw ro uwow knalej nańßa, …£mluw …£luw na ina ms~…ēo Ēun mani Ē ro mnő≤uw uwow, ms~…ēo Ēun mowas~…ē ro mijij, ő≤eta mas~…ēu Ē pn Ēas~…ē.
